_publications._publicationTitle: Frequent EGFR Positivity and Overexpression in High-Grade Areas of Human MPNSTs.

_contextSnippet: staining with survivin, which was positive in all the cases of MPNST, was diffuse to all tumour areas
details: Showed positive staining in all MPNST cases with diffuse distribution to all tumor areas, contrasting with EGFR heterogeneous pattern
